MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Michael W. Thomas; Thomas & Associates; 916-789-1201; appearing on behalf of plaintiffs Maria Elisa Matus, et al.
Rye P. Murphy; Goldfarb & Lipman LLP; 510-836-6336; appearing on behalf of defendant Freedom West Homes Corporation.

Plaintiffs' counsel contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR AWARD OF REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES is GRANTED. Defendants are the prevailing party in this case that ended in voluntary dismissal on February 24, 2022.

Off Calendar Jul-21-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motions And Motions To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:(Zoom appearances)
Michael Thomas, 916.789.1201 for Plaintiffs Maria Elisa Matus et al.
Rye Murphy, 510 836.6336 for Defendant Freedom West Co-Operative Housing.
Erin Lapeyrolerie, 510 836.6336 for Defendant Freedom West Co-Operative Housing.

Argued by the Plaintiff. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT FREEDOM WEST HOMES CORPORATION Notice Of Motions And Motions To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is GRANTED. Assuming without deciding that the court has discretion to deny this motion per CCP 1281.2(c), the court declines to exercise that discretion because MacFarlane Partners, LLC has not appeared in this case notwithstanding that the case was filed 9 months ago. Plaintiffs have not shown that Freedom West waived its right to arbitrate the claims alleged against it. Nor have plaintiffs shown that the arbitration provision in the bylaws is unenforceable. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
